title: hieracium oligadenum
intro: Hieracium oligadenum, also known as small hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Hieracium oligadenum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties.
